content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only this file.

Thanks for the heads up. I'll only touch __init__ signature and the top of get_source() in FileSystemLoader (add optional path_transform param + apply transform to a local var before the search loop), keeping the original searchpath loop logic untouched. I won't touch list_templates or your fallback_searchpath logic. Let me know if you're also changing __init__ signature so we can merge order matter - I'll add path_transform as a keyword-only trailing param to minimize signature conflicts.

Heads up: I just checked src/jinja2/loaders.py and I don't see fallback_searchpath anywhere in FileSystemLoader (__init__ still has the original 3-param signature). Did your edit make it to disk? I haven't touched FileSystemLoader yet so I didn't clobber it. Want to double check before I add path_transform there so we don't lose your work.

My path_transform edits are done across all 6 loaders in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader), full test suite passes (841 tests). I added path_transform as the trailing kwarg in FileSystemLoader.__init__ right after followlinks - no fallback_searchpath present in the file yet on my end, so nothing to merge with currently. If you still plan to add fallback_searchpath, just add it as another trailing kwarg after path_transform (or before, doesn't matter) and extend the get_source/list_templates loops - my transform logic only touches the top of get_source (transforms  into a local var + keeps original_template for error messages), so it shouldn't interfere with your loop changes.

Correction to my last message (backtick typo broke it): my path_transform edits are done across all 6 loaders in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Full test suite passes (841 tests). In FileSystemLoader.__init__ I added path_transform as trailing kwarg right after followlinks. I do not see fallback_searchpath in the file, so nothing to merge yet. My change only touches the top of get_source (transform template into a local var, keep original template for error messages) so it should not interfere with a loop change you make later.
